productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Tshirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves and brand name lettered on the front in flock print Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron directly on print/embroidery Perfect in style and great in comfort, this white cotton t-shirt from united colors of benetton makes for great casual wear. The flock print lettering on the front lends this a strong brand identity, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
